childhood.familyBackground: Chinese immigrant family. Father was engineer. Strong education values.

childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in Shanghai. Exposed to technology and engineering.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 상하이에서 성장. 기술 및 공학에 노출

careerTimeline.event: Founded video conferencing startup in China
Relocated company to US for global expansion
careerTimeline.eventKo: 글로벌 확장을 위해 미국으로 회사 이전

careerTimeline.event: Company IPO, became major video platform
careerTimeline.eventKo: 회사 IPO, 주요 비디오 플랫폼이 됨

failures.description: Initial product faced competition and market challenges
failures.descriptionKo: 초기 제품이 경쟁 및 시장 문제 직면

quotes.textKo: 기술은 거리 전역에 걸쳐 사람들을 연결

personalTraits.knownFor: Building world's leading video conferencing platform
personalTraits.knownForKo: 세계 선도 화상 회의 플랫폼 구축
